event.harsh_winter.options.0.label.defau.context: Event harsh_winter, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Share your wood with the neighbors.

event.harsh_winter.options.1.label.defau.context: Event harsh_winter, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.harsh_winter.text.default.context: Event harsh_winter, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The frost comes early and stays like an unwanted guest. Firewood dwindles; the old and the weak begin to die.

event.harsh_winter.title.default.context: Event harsh_winter, title, faith branch default.

event.harvest.options.0.failure.text.def.context: Event harvest, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A thin, sad yield. Winter will have teeth this year.

event.harvest.options.0.label.default.context: Event harvest, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.harvest.options.0.success.text.def.context: Event harvest, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: A fat harvest! Granaries groan, and there is a surplus to sell.

event.harvest.text.default.context: Event harvest, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Scythes hiss in the fields from first light to last. The whole village works, prays, and counts.

event.harvest.title.default.context: Event harvest, title, faith branch default.

event.hawk_with_emir.options.0.label.def.context: Event hawk_with_emir, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.hawk_with_emir.options.1.failure.t.context: Event hawk_with_emir, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your falcon vanishes over the ridge with your dignity.

event.hawk_with_emir.options.1.label.def.context: Event hawk_with_emir, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.hawk_with_emir.options.1.success.t.context: Event hawk_with_emir, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your bird stoops first and truest. Bold — perhaps too bold. But men saw it.

event.hawk_with_emir.text.default.context: Event hawk_with_emir, text, faith branch default.

source.text: An invitation to ride with {lord} and his falcons — swift horses, gazelle on the plain, and the quiet talk between great men that shapes small futures.

event.hawk_with_emir.title.default.context: Event hawk_with_emir, title, faith branch default.

event.heir_question.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event heir_question, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

event.heir_question.options.0.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for heir_question, authored option 0, effects.

event.heir_question.options.0.label.defa.context: Event heir_question, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.heir_question.options.1.label.defa.context: Event heir_question, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.heir_question.options.2.label.defa.context: Event heir_question, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.heir_question.text.default.context: Event heir_question, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Your counselors raise it delicately: you will not live forever, and unsettled successions drown realms in blood.

event.heir_question.title.default.context: Event heir_question, title, faith branch default.

event.heresy_whiff.options.0.label.defau.context: Event heresy_whiff, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Burn the page and recant privately.

event.heresy_whiff.options.1.failure.tex.context: Event heresy_whiff, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You are made to do public penance, barefoot in the snow.

event.heresy_whiff.options.1.label.defau.context: Event heresy_whiff, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.heresy_whiff.options.1.success.tex.context: Event heresy_whiff, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your argument dazzles the examiners; the notion is ruled orthodox after all.

event.heresy_whiff.text.default.context: Event heresy_whiff, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Late study breeds late thoughts. In the margin of an old text you have written something that, read coldly, smells of heresy. Another hand has underlined it.

event.heresy_whiff.title.default.context: Event heresy_whiff, title, faith branch default.

event.hold_court_event.options.0.label.d.context: Event hold_court_event, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.hold_court_event.options.1.label.d.context: Event hold_court_event, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.hold_court_event.options.2.label.d.context: Event hold_court_event, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Let the reeve sort it out.

event.hold_court_event.text.default.context: Event hold_court_event, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Court day. Two farmers claim one cow; a widow begs relief of taxes; a merchant accuses your reeve of taking bribes.

event.hold_court_event.title.default.context: Event hold_court_event, title, faith branch default.

event.host_battle.options.0.failure.text.context: Event host_battle, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A mace finds your helm; your men drag you clear. You bled in the liege’s cause, and that too is remembered.

event.host_battle.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event host_battle, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Fight where the press is thickest.

event.host_battle.options.0.success.text.context: Event host_battle, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your part of the line holds, then breaks them. The liege marks it — and so does everyone else.

event.host_battle.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event host_battle, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Hold your ground and spend your men carefully.

event.host_battle.text.default.context: Event host_battle, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The liege’s war finds its field. Your banner has its place in the line, and great men are watching how you hold it.

event.host_battle.title.default.context: Event host_battle, title, faith branch default.

event.host_camp.options.0.failure.text.d.context: Event host_camp, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You misjudge a jest at a great man’s expense. Cold looks follow you to your tent.

event.host_camp.options.0.label.default.context: Event host_camp, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.host_camp.options.0.success.text.d.context: Event host_camp, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The right ears, the right words. Doors will open after this war.

event.host_camp.options.1.label.default.context: Event host_camp, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.host_camp.options.2.label.default.context: Event host_camp, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.host_camp.text.default.context: Event host_camp, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A war camp is a court under canvas: lords trade grievances, wagers, and promises between the watch-fires.

event.host_camp.title.default.context: Event host_camp, title, faith branch default.

event.host_discipline.options.0.label.de.context: Event host_discipline, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.host_discipline.options.1.label.de.context: Event host_discipline, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Flog them and repay the woman.

event.host_discipline.options.2.label.de.context: Event host_discipline, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.host_discipline.text.default.context: Event host_discipline, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Two of your men are dragged before you with a farmwife’s silver in their packs. The camp watches to see what your banner is worth.

event.host_discipline.title.default.context: Event host_discipline, title, faith branch default.

event.house_claim.options.0.desc.default.context: Event house_claim, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Your standing and cunning against their lawyers and pride.

event.house_claim.options.0.failure.effe.context: Durable event log for house_claim, authored option 0, failure.effects.

source.text: The house of {late} shut its doors on {childname}.

event.house_claim.options.0.failure.text.context: Event house_claim, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The house closes ranks. Cold words, a grudging purse, and a door shut on {childname}’s name.

event.house_claim.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event house_claim, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.house_claim.options.0.success.effe.context: Durable event log for house_claim, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: {childname} was acknowledged by the house of {late}.

event.house_claim.options.0.success.text.context: Event house_claim, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Oaths are read, kin are counted — and the house yields. {childname} is named to the inheritance, and its stewardship falls to your side of the hearth.

event.house_claim.options.1.desc.default.context: Event house_claim, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A fat purse now, and no feud.

event.house_claim.options.1.effects.log..context: Durable event log for house_claim, authored option 1, effects.

source.text: Sold {childname}’s claim on the house of {late}.

event.house_claim.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event house_claim, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Sell the claim back to them.

event.house_claim.options.2.effects.log..context: Durable event log for house_claim, authored option 2, effects.

source.text: Let {childname}’s claim on the house of {late} rest.

event.house_claim.options.2.label.defaul.context: Event house_claim, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Let the claim sleep. The child needs no feud.

event.house_claim.text.default.context: Event house_claim, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {late} is dead — and {childname}, your child together, carries the blood of a house that never welcomed you. Now its kin gather to settle the inheritance, and every eye turns to your child.

event.house_claim.title.default.context: Event house_claim, title, faith branch default.

event.hunt_with_lord.options.0.label.def.context: Event hunt_with_lord, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.hunt_with_lord.options.1.failure.t.context: Event hunt_with_lord, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The boar takes exception. You are carried home on a litter.

event.hunt_with_lord.options.1.label.def.context: Event hunt_with_lord, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.hunt_with_lord.options.1.success.t.context: Event hunt_with_lord, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your spear takes the boar before the lord’s. Bold — perhaps too bold. But men saw it.

event.hunt_with_lord.text.default.context: Event hunt_with_lord, text, faith branch default.

source.text: An invitation to ride with {lord}’s hunt — hounds, horns, and the talk between great men that shapes small futures.

event.hunt_with_lord.title.default.context: Event hunt_with_lord, title, faith branch default.

event.independence_offer.options.0.effec.context: Durable event log for independence_offer, authored option 0, effects.

event.independence_offer.options.0.label.context: Event independence_offer, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.independence_offer.options.1.label.context: Event independence_offer, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Report the plotters to the liege.

event.independence_offer.options.2.label.context: Event independence_offer, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.independence_offer.text.default.context: Event independence_offer, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Discontented lords gather in your hall when the candles burn low. “Why kneel at all?” they murmur. “Your own banner. Your own crown.”

event.independence_offer.title.default.context: Event independence_offer, title, faith branch default.

event.iron_shortage.options.0.label.defa.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.iron_shortage.options.1.failure.te.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A customer notices. Loudly. In the market.

event.iron_shortage.options.1.label.defa.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.iron_shortage.options.1.success.te.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Nobody notices the difference. This season, at least.

event.iron_shortage.options.2.label.defa.context: Event iron_shortage, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.iron_shortage.text.default.context: Event iron_shortage, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The ore caravans have not come — war or weather, nobody knows. Every smith and joiner in town is bidding for the same scraps.

event.iron_shortage.title.default.context: Event iron_shortage, title, faith branch default.

event.item_offer.options.0.label.default.context: Event item_offer, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.item_offer.options.1.label.default.context: Event item_offer, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.item_offer.text.default.context: Event item_offer, text, faith branch default.

source.text: From wrappings of oiled cloth comes {item}. The price is {itemprice} gold — and worth it twice over, says the seller, to the right person.

event.item_offer.title.default.context: Event item_offer, title, faith branch default.

event.judgment_at_door.options.0.failure.context: Event judgment_at_door, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your ruling pleases one house and makes an enemy of the other.

event.judgment_at_door.options.0.label.d.context: Event judgment_at_door, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.judgment_at_door.options.0.success.context: Event judgment_at_door, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your judgment threads the needle; both leave grumbling equally — which is to say, satisfied.

event.judgment_at_door.options.1.label.d.context: Event judgment_at_door, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Send them to the lord’s court.

event.judgment_at_door.text.default.context: Event judgment_at_door, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Two families arrive at the {temple} gate with one dispute, three witnesses, and absolute certainty on both sides. They will take your word as {god}’s.

event.judgment_at_door.title.default.context: Event judgment_at_door, title, faith branch default.

event.knighted.options.0.effects.log.def.context: Durable event log for knighted, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Raised to the gentry for valor!

event.knighted.options.0.label.default.context: Event knighted, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.knighted.text.default.context: Event knighted, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Before the assembled retinue, {lord} bids you kneel. A sword touches your shoulder. When you rise, you are no longer common.

event.knighted.title.default.context: Event knighted, title, faith branch default.

event.lean_winter.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.lean_winter.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.lean_winter.options.2.failure.text.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The forester catches you red-handed over the carcass.

event.lean_winter.options.2.label.defaul.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.lean_winter.options.2.success.text.context: Event lean_winter, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: Venison in the pot, and none the wiser.

event.lean_winter.text.default.context: Event lean_winter, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The grain jar echoes. Your household chews bark-bread and watches the snow.

event.lean_winter.title.default.context: Event lean_winter, title, faith branch default.

event.levy_call.options.0.effects.log.de.context: Durable event log for levy_call, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Marched to war with the levy.

event.levy_call.options.0.label.default.context: Event levy_call, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.levy_call.options.1.label.default.context: Event levy_call, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay a stranger to march in your place.

event.levy_call.options.2.failure.text.d.context: Event levy_call, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Dragged from the hayloft and marched off in a rope collar.

event.levy_call.options.2.label.default.context: Event levy_call, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.levy_call.options.2.success.text.d.context: Event levy_call, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: You dodge the levy — and the war.

event.levy_call.text.default.context: Event levy_call, text, faith branch default.

source.text: War. The reeve reads the summons at the {temple} door: every able man of {province} to muster with spear, shield, and three weeks’ bread.

event.levy_call.title.default.context: Event levy_call, title, faith branch default.

event.liege_appeal.options.0.failure.tex.context: Event liege_appeal, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: “I do not poach another man’s vassals.” Worse — a letter about your visit rides back to your liege.

event.liege_appeal.options.0.label.defau.context: Event liege_appeal, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.liege_appeal.options.0.success.eff.context: Durable event log for liege_appeal, authored option 0, success.effects.

event.liege_appeal.options.0.success.tex.context: Event liege_appeal, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The high lord strokes his beard. “No good sword should rust under a small master.” He takes your oath himself.

event.liege_appeal.options.1.label.defau.context: Event liege_appeal, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Think better of it, and withdraw.

event.liege_appeal.text.default.context: Event liege_appeal, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You kneel before {rulername} of {rname} and lay out your suit: your own lord is unjust, you say, and you would serve a worthier hand — his.

event.liege_appeal.title.default.context: Event liege_appeal, title, faith branch default.

event.liege_summons.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event liege_summons, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Join the liege’s host for the length of the war.

event.liege_summons.options.0.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for liege_summons, authored option 0, effects.

event.liege_summons.options.0.label.defa.context: Event liege_summons, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.liege_summons.options.1.label.defa.context: Event liege_summons, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.liege_summons.options.2.label.defa.context: Event liege_summons, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.liege_summons.text.default.context: Event liege_summons, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A herald in your liege’s colors: war is declared, and your banner is called to muster with all your strength.

event.liege_summons.title.default.context: Event liege_summons, title, faith branch default.

event.liege_tax.options.0.label.default.context: Event liege_tax, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.liege_tax.options.1.label.default.context: Event liege_tax, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.liege_tax.options.2.label.default.context: Event liege_tax, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.liege_tax.text.default.context: Event liege_tax, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Collectors arrive from {liege} with tallies and wax: the lord calls an extraordinary aid upon all his vassals — your chest included.

event.liege_tax.title.default.context: Event liege_tax, title, faith branch default.

event.liege_war_ends.options.0.effects.l.context: Durable event log for liege_war_ends, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Came home from the liege’s war.

event.liege_war_ends.options.0.label.def.context: Event liege_war_ends, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.liege_war_ends.text.default.context: Event liege_war_ends, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The liege’s war is done. The great camp folds tent by tent, and the banners turn for home — yours among them, with honor.

event.liege_war_ends.title.default.context: Event liege_war_ends, title, faith branch default.

event.loot_temptation.options.0.label.de.context: Event loot_temptation, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Take your share of houses — not the {temple}.

event.loot_temptation.options.1.label.de.context: Event loot_temptation, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.loot_temptation.options.2.label.de.context: Event loot_temptation, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.loot_temptation.text.default.context: Event loot_temptation, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The town has fallen and discipline with it. Doors splinter; men stagger past with armfuls of plate and cloth. The {temple} stands unguarded.

event.loot_temptation.title.default.context: Event loot_temptation, title, faith branch default.

event.lord_covets_horse.options.0.label..context: Event lord_covets_horse, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.lord_covets_horse.options.1.failur.context: Event lord_covets_horse, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Days later the horse is “requisitioned for the levy.” You are paid a tenth of its worth.

event.lord_covets_horse.options.1.label..context: Event lord_covets_horse, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.lord_covets_horse.options.1.succes.context: Event lord_covets_horse, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: He grunts, half insulted and half impressed, and rides on.

event.lord_covets_horse.text.default.context: Event lord_covets_horse, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {lord} reins in beside your warhorse and looks it over far too long. “A fine beast,” he says, “for a common man.”

event.lord_covets_horse.title.default.context: Event lord_covets_horse, title, faith branch default.

event.lords_notice.options.0.effects.log.context: Durable event log for lords_notice, authored option 0, effects.

event.lords_notice.options.0.label.defau.context: Event lords_notice, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: “My freedom, lord, if I earn it.”

event.lords_notice.options.1.label.defau.context: Event lords_notice, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.lords_notice.options.2.label.defau.context: Event lords_notice, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.lords_notice.text.default.context: Event lords_notice, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {lord} reins in beside your strip of field. “You. You’re the one who works like two men. What is it you want in this life?”

event.lords_notice.title.default.context: Event lords_notice, title, faith branch default.

event.made_abbot.options.0.failure.text..context: Event made_abbot, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The prior’s faction outvotes yours. You remain a brother among brothers.

event.made_abbot.options.0.label.default.context: Event made_abbot, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.made_abbot.options.0.success.effec.context: Durable event log for made_abbot, authored option 0, success.effects.

event.made_abbot.options.0.success.text..context: Event made_abbot, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The house is yours to rule — lands, tithes, and souls.

event.made_abbot.options.1.label.default.context: Event made_abbot, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.made_abbot.text.default.context: Event made_abbot, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The old abbot has gone to his reward. The brothers gather to choose a successor, and many eyes turn to you.

event.made_abbot.title.default.context: Event made_abbot, title, faith branch default.

event.made_qadi.options.0.failure.text.d.context: Event made_qadi, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A rival with better connections is chosen. Your time will come.

event.made_qadi.options.0.label.default.context: Event made_qadi, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.made_qadi.options.0.success.effect.context: Durable event log for made_qadi, authored option 0, success.effects.

event.made_qadi.options.0.success.text.d.context: Event made_qadi, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The seat is yours — disputes, deeds, and dowries, all beneath your seal.

event.made_qadi.options.1.label.default.context: Event made_qadi, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.made_qadi.text.default.context: Event made_qadi, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The old qadi has died, and the district needs a judge — a man of learning, piety, and patience. The notables gather, and many eyes turn to you.

event.made_qadi.title.default.context: Event made_qadi, title, faith branch default.

event.madrasa_study.options.0.label.defa.context: Event madrasa_study, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.madrasa_study.options.1.failure.te.context: Event madrasa_study, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A blot of ink ruins a week’s work. Begin again, with patience.

event.madrasa_study.options.1.label.defa.context: Event madrasa_study, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Copy the great works of law and medicine.

event.madrasa_study.options.1.success.te.context: Event madrasa_study, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your copies are precise and sought after. Scholars speak your name.

event.madrasa_study.text.default.context: Event madrasa_study, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Cool tiles, murmured recitation, and the scratch of reed pens. Your calligraphy improves line by line, and the master of the madrasa watches your progress with interest.

event.madrasa_study.title.default.context: Event madrasa_study, title, faith branch default.

event.make_friend.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event make_friend, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.make_friend.text.default.context: Event make_friend, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Long hours shared with {friend} — work, jokes, a jug passed back and forth — have become something like brotherhood.

event.make_friend.text.muslim.context: Event make_friend, text, faith branch muslim.

source.text: Long hours shared with {friend} — work, jokes, a water-skin passed back and forth — have become something like brotherhood.

event.make_friend.title.default.context: Event make_friend, title, faith branch default.

event.make_rival.options.0.label.default.context: Event make_rival, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.make_rival.options.1.label.default.context: Event make_rival, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.make_rival.text.default.context: Event make_rival, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {rival} has taken against you — a slight, a dispute over a boundary stone, a look held too long. It festers.

event.make_rival.title.default.context: Event make_rival, title, faith branch default.

event.manumission.options.0.effects.log..context: Durable event log for manumission, authored option 0, effects.

event.manumission.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event manumission, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.manumission.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event manumission, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.manumission.text.default.context: Event manumission, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The {holy} drafts the charter by candlelight. For thirty pieces of silver, {lord} will strike your name from the roll of serfs — forever.

event.manumission.title.default.context: Event manumission, title, faith branch default.

event.market_day_find.options.0.failure..context: Event market_day_find, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A week later its owner arrives with the reeve. The ox goes home; your coin does not.

event.market_day_find.options.0.label.de.context: Event market_day_find, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.market_day_find.options.0.success..context: Event market_day_find, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: A fine beast, honestly come by or not. Your ploughing doubles.

event.market_day_find.options.1.label.de.context: Event market_day_find, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.market_day_find.text.default.context: Event market_day_find, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A trader down on his luck offers a sturdy ox for a quarter its worth. His eyes dart as he talks.

event.market_day_find.title.default.context: Event market_day_find, title, faith branch default.

event.masters_empty_bench.options.0.fail.context: Event masters_empty_bench, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Good material becomes expensive scrap. The widow says nothing.

event.masters_empty_bench.options.0.labe.context: Event masters_empty_bench, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.masters_empty_bench.options.0.succ.context: Event masters_empty_bench, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The work comes together beneath hands the master trained.

event.masters_empty_bench.options.1.labe.context: Event masters_empty_bench, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Advance the widow six gold for materials.

event.masters_empty_bench.options.2.fail.context: Event masters_empty_bench, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Figures wander across the page without yielding a useful truth.

event.masters_empty_bench.options.2.labe.context: Event masters_empty_bench, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.masters_empty_bench.options.2.succ.context: Event masters_empty_bench, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: The patron has paid less than half while claiming to have paid all.

event.masters_empty_bench.options.3.labe.context: Event masters_empty_bench, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Buy the tools and obligations together. (12 gold)

event.masters_empty_bench.options.4.labe.context: Event masters_empty_bench, authored option 4, label, branch default.

source.text: A dead master’s debts are not yours.

event.masters_empty_bench.text.default.context: Event masters_empty_bench, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Your old master dies with a commission unfinished, debts in the ledger, and a widow facing men who have already begun measuring the workshop.

event.masters_empty_bench.title.default.context: Event masters_empty_bench, title, faith branch default.

event.masterwork.options.0.failure.text..context: Event masterwork, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A flaw in the final hour ruins it. The patron pays half, scowling.

event.masterwork.options.0.label.default.context: Event masterwork, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.masterwork.options.0.success.effec.context: Durable event log for masterwork, authored option 0, success.effects.

event.masterwork.options.0.success.text..context: Event masterwork, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: It is the finest thing you have ever made. Word spreads.

event.masterwork.text.default.context: Event masterwork, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A commission worthy of your best: fine work for a great house. Succeed, and your name travels farther than you ever have.

event.masterwork.title.default.context: Event masterwork, title, faith branch default.

event.meet_suitor.options.0.desc.default.context: Event meet_suitor, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Court them daily until their regard is won.

event.meet_suitor.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event meet_suitor, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.meet_suitor.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event meet_suitor, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.meet_suitor.text.default.context: Event meet_suitor, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Through kin and gossip you are introduced to {suitor}. There is a certain promise in the meeting — and marriage is how fortunes are made.

event.meet_suitor.title.default.context: Event meet_suitor, title, faith branch default.

event.melee_games.options.0.failure.text.context: Event melee_games, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A mace you never saw ends your day early.

event.melee_games.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event melee_games, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.melee_games.options.0.success.text.context: Event melee_games, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: You unhorse two men and yield to none. The prize purse and the glory are yours.

event.melee_games.options.1.failure.text.context: Event melee_games, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Your man eats mud in the first pass.

event.melee_games.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event melee_games, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.melee_games.options.1.success.text.context: Event melee_games, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

event.melee_games.text.default.context: Event melee_games, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {lord} holds a gathering of arms: mock battle with blunted steel, wagers, and every ambitious sword in the province watching.

event.melee_games.title.default.context: Event melee_games, title, faith branch default.

event.mill_reckoning.options.0.failure.t.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: He calls the repair a tenant’s duty and takes the toll besides.

event.mill_reckoning.options.0.label.def.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Demand payment for the work you did.

event.mill_reckoning.options.0.success.t.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The miller pays rather than explain to the village why its savior owes him coin.

event.mill_reckoning.options.1.label.def.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Take a season’s freedom from toll instead.

event.mill_reckoning.options.2.failure.t.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The words are less plain than you hoped. Two millers now want paying.

event.mill_reckoning.options.2.label.def.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Show that a failed mill voids its toll.

event.mill_reckoning.options.2.success.t.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: The old custom is plain enough. The tally closes without your name.

event.mill_reckoning.options.3.label.def.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay both millers and be done. (4 gold)

event.mill_reckoning.options.4.failure.t.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 4, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A child points directly at the hidden sack. The fine is immediate.

event.mill_reckoning.options.4.label.def.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 4, label, branch default.

source.text: Deny there was ever another quern.

event.mill_reckoning.options.4.success.t.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 4, success text, branch default.

source.text: He finds neither flour nor witness, and leaves with an empty tally.

event.mill_reckoning.options.5.label.def.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 5, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay the fine before it grows. (6 gold)

event.mill_reckoning.options.6.failure.t.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 6, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The lord tires of the question. The toll stands.

event.mill_reckoning.options.6.label.def.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 6, label, branch default.

source.text: Press the appeal one last time.

event.mill_reckoning.options.6.success.t.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 6, success text, branch default.

source.text: The lord confirms the waiver and rebukes the miller for greed.

event.mill_reckoning.options.7.label.def.context: Event mill_reckoning, authored option 7, label, branch default.

event.mill_reckoning.text.default.context: Event mill_reckoning, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The miller arrives with his tally. Broken wheel or not, he says the lord is owed his customary share.

event.mill_reckoning.title.default.context: Event mill_reckoning, title, faith branch default.

event.mill_will_not_turn.options.0.failu.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The timber shifts at the wrong moment. The wheel remains still and you limp home.

event.mill_will_not_turn.options.0.label.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Put shoulder and tools to the gearing.

event.mill_will_not_turn.options.0.succe.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: By dusk the wheel turns again. Every sack behind yours was saved by your hands.

event.mill_will_not_turn.options.1.label.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Carry the grain to another mill.

event.mill_will_not_turn.options.2.label.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Load it on the pack mule.

event.mill_will_not_turn.options.3.failu.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, authored option 3, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Flour dust and gossip travel equally well. The miller knows.

event.mill_will_not_turn.options.3.label.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Grind secretly and deny the toll.

event.mill_will_not_turn.options.3.succe.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, authored option 3, success text, branch default.

source.text: The hand-querns turn behind shuttered doors. The flour is poor, but it is yours.

event.mill_will_not_turn.options.4.failu.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, authored option 4, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A toll is a toll, you are told, whether or not the wheel turned.

event.mill_will_not_turn.options.4.label.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, authored option 4, label, branch default.

event.mill_will_not_turn.options.4.succe.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, authored option 4, success text, branch default.

source.text: The request is judged reasonable. The miller is told to swallow the loss.

event.mill_will_not_turn.text.default.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The mill wheel shudders to a stop with half the village’s grain waiting and rain in the air. Spoiled grain feeds nobody, but the miller still speaks of his toll.

event.mill_will_not_turn.title.default.context: Event mill_will_not_turn, title, faith branch default.

event.moneylending.options.0.failure.tex.context: Event moneylending, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: He defaults — but the mill pledge makes you whole, and an enemy.

event.moneylending.options.0.label.defau.context: Event moneylending, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.moneylending.options.0.success.tex.context: Event moneylending, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

event.moneylending.options.1.label.defau.context: Event moneylending, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.moneylending.options.2.label.defau.context: Event moneylending, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.moneylending.text.default.context: Event moneylending, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A landowner needs thirty pieces before harvest and will pledge his mill as surety. Usury is frowned upon — profit rarely is.

event.moneylending.title.default.context: Event moneylending, title, faith branch default.

event.night_sortie.options.0.failure.tex.context: Event night_sortie, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A sentry’s cry, a running fight in the dark. You crawl back to the lines bleeding.

event.night_sortie.options.0.label.defau.context: Event night_sortie, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.night_sortie.options.0.success.tex.context: Event night_sortie, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Fires in the dark, cut ropes, panicked horses. You are back before dawn with loot and a story.

event.night_sortie.options.1.label.defau.context: Event night_sortie, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.night_sortie.text.default.context: Event night_sortie, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The captain wants men for a night raid on the enemy pickets — quiet feet, quick knives, and no promises about the morning.

event.night_sortie.title.default.context: Event night_sortie, title, faith branch default.

event.old_age_reflection.options.0.label.context: Event old_age_reflection, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: My name. My blood. My house.

event.old_age_reflection.options.1.label.context: Event old_age_reflection, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.old_age_reflection.options.2.label.context: Event old_age_reflection, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.old_age_reflection.options.3.label.context: Event old_age_reflection, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Nothing. So savor the days that remain.

event.old_age_reflection.text.default.context: Event old_age_reflection, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Your hands ache with old labors. Children you knew as babes now have grey in their beards. What remains, when the body fails?

event.old_age_reflection.title.default.context: Event old_age_reflection, title, faith branch default.

event.old_custom_end.options.0.effects.l.context: Durable event log for old_custom_end, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Secured the ancient rights of common.

event.old_custom_end.options.0.label.def.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Bind the right to every hearth.

event.old_custom_end.options.1.label.def.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Renew the right already held by your house.

event.old_custom_end.options.10.effects..context: Durable event log for old_custom_end, authored option 10, effects.

source.text: Profited from the closing of the common.

event.old_custom_end.options.10.label.de.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 10, label, branch default.

source.text: Take the reeve’s purse and office.

event.old_custom_end.options.11.label.de.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 11, label, branch default.

source.text: Confess, and expose what the reeve paid for.

event.old_custom_end.options.2.effects.l.context: Durable event log for old_custom_end, authored option 2, effects.

source.text: Won freedom in the struggle over the common.

event.old_custom_end.options.2.label.def.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Ask for your freedom as the price.

event.old_custom_end.options.3.label.def.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Ask instead for a place in the lord’s service.

event.old_custom_end.options.4.label.def.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 4, label, branch default.

event.old_custom_end.options.5.effects.l.context: Durable event log for old_custom_end, authored option 5, effects.

source.text: Bought confirmation of the household’s common rights.

event.old_custom_end.options.5.label.def.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 5, label, branch default.

event.old_custom_end.options.6.failure.t.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 6, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The reeve’s men are waiting among the trees.

event.old_custom_end.options.6.label.def.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 6, label, branch default.

source.text: Pull the stakes down after dark.

event.old_custom_end.options.6.success.t.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 6, success text, branch default.

source.text: By dawn no stake stands and no witness remembers a face. Use becomes custom once more.

event.old_custom_end.options.7.label.def.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 7, label, branch default.

event.old_custom_end.options.8.label.def.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 8, label, branch default.

event.old_custom_end.options.9.label.def.context: Event old_custom_end, authored option 9, label, branch default.

event.old_custom_end.text.default.context: Event old_custom_end, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The stakes, the hearing, and the names spoken there will be remembered. What matters now is what your household carries away.

event.old_custom_end.title.default.context: Event old_custom_end, title, faith branch default.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.0.failu.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The steward calls it noise, not law. The reeve’s smile returns.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.0.label.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: “Custom lives in those who keep it.”

event.old_custom_hearing.options.0.succe.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: One witness follows another until even the steward must call the custom proven.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.1.failu.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The steward finds three errors before you finish the first column.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.1.label.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Lay out the rents, measures, and losses.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.1.succe.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: The reeve’s demand contradicts his own accounts. The bench notices.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.2.failu.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The record speaks of another field, or perhaps another village. The case collapses in the reading.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.2.label.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Read the oldest words you found.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.2.succe.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: The old formula leaves little room to wriggle. The right is older than the reeve’s office.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.3.failu.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 3, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The accusation lands as slander. The steward fines insolence as well as defeat.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.3.label.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Prove that the reeve means to rob lord and village alike.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.3.succe.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 3, success text, branch default.

source.text: A concealed tally and a frightened clerk do what righteous speeches could not.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.4.label.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 4, label, branch default.

event.old_custom_hearing.options.5.label.context: Event old_custom_hearing, authored option 5, label, branch default.

event.old_custom_hearing.text.default.context: Event old_custom_hearing, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The households crowd the hall. The reeve has his tally and his men; you have whatever truth, skill, and favor you managed to gather.

event.old_custom_hearing.title.default.context: Event old_custom_hearing, title, faith branch default.

event.old_custom_memory.options.0.failur.context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Two witnesses fall to shouting over whose grandfather owned which sow.

event.old_custom_memory.options.0.label..context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Take sworn testimony from every hearth.

event.old_custom_memory.options.0.succes.context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The stories agree where it matters. A village speaking together is difficult to dismiss.

event.old_custom_memory.options.1.failur.context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The page that might have settled it was scraped clean generations ago.

event.old_custom_memory.options.1.label..context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.old_custom_memory.options.1.succes.context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: In a faded hand: pasture, fallen wood, and water, reserved to the households in perpetuity.

event.old_custom_memory.options.2.failur.context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The forester finds you beyond the new stakes and reports the trespass.

event.old_custom_memory.options.2.label..context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Walk the old boundary by night.

event.old_custom_memory.options.2.succes.context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: Notches on trees and stones beneath the moss agree with the oldest memories.

event.old_custom_memory.options.3.label..context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Pay a clerk for a clean copy. (8 gold)

event.old_custom_memory.options.4.failur.context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 4, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The clerk recognizes his predecessor’s hand — and knows this is not it.

event.old_custom_memory.options.4.label..context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 4, label, branch default.

event.old_custom_memory.options.4.succes.context: Event old_custom_memory, authored option 4, success text, branch default.

source.text: Old ink, old phrasing, an old seal impressed again. It may be enough.

event.old_custom_memory.text.default.context: Event old_custom_memory, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Every elder remembers the boundary, but none remembers it quite alike. If custom is to stand before judgment, memory must become proof.

event.old_custom_memory.title.default.context: Event old_custom_memory, title, faith branch default.

event.old_custom_reeve.options.0.label.d.context: Event old_custom_reeve, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.old_custom_reeve.options.1.label.d.context: Event old_custom_reeve, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Take the purse and give him names.

event.old_custom_reeve.options.2.failure.context: Event old_custom_reeve, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: He recognizes the trap and leaves smiling. The next threat will not be private.

event.old_custom_reeve.options.2.label.d.context: Event old_custom_reeve, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Make him reveal whose purse it truly is.

event.old_custom_reeve.options.2.success.context: Event old_custom_reeve, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: A feigned misunderstanding draws out the second tally — the one the lord has never seen.

event.old_custom_reeve.options.3.failure.context: Event old_custom_reeve, authored option 3, failure text, branch default.

source.text: His men put you down hard, but they must do it where everyone can see.

event.old_custom_reeve.options.3.label.d.context: Event old_custom_reeve, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Make him use the stick in public.

event.old_custom_reeve.options.3.success.context: Event old_custom_reeve, authored option 3, success text, branch default.

source.text: You do not give ground. By morning every bruise in the village belongs to your cause.

event.old_custom_reeve.options.4.label.d.context: Event old_custom_reeve, authored option 4, label, branch default.

source.text: Ask {lord} to examine his own reeve.

event.old_custom_reeve.options.5.label.d.context: Event old_custom_reeve, authored option 5, label, branch default.

source.text: Ask {priest} to stand as protector. (5 piety)

event.old_custom_reeve.text.default.context: Event old_custom_reeve, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The reeve comes without his men. First he offers a purse. Then he explains, very softly, what refusal may cost.

event.old_custom_reeve.title.default.context: Event old_custom_reeve, title, faith branch default.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.0.failur.context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Old grudges prove stronger than old custom. Half the village will not stand beside the other half.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.0.label..context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.0.succes.context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Quarrels are put aside. One by one, the households agree to speak with a single voice.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.1.failur.context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The strips, ditches, and remembered bounds refuse to add up cleanly.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.1.label..context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Measure exactly what is being taken.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.1.succes.context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Paces, rents, beasts, winter fuel — you put a number to every loss.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.2.failur.context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Dust, worm-holes, and pious accounts — but no grant anyone can use.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.2.label..context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Find words older than the reeve.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.2.succes.context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: A neglected record speaks of pasture and fuel owed to every hearth.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.3.failur.context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 3, failure text, branch default.

source.text: He takes the names, keeps his coin, and looks at you with contempt.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.3.label..context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Tell the reeve who is stirring trouble.

event.old_custom_stakes.options.3.succes.context: Event old_custom_stakes, authored option 3, success text, branch default.

source.text: The reeve pays for names and promises to remember yours kindly.

event.old_custom_stakes.text.default.context: Event old_custom_stakes, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Fresh stakes stand across the waste where the households of {province} have grazed beasts, cut fuel, and drawn water since anyone remembers. The reeve says it is the lord’s land, and tomorrow it will be closed.

event.old_custom_stakes.title.default.context: Event old_custom_stakes, title, faith branch default.

event.partner_offer.options.0.failure.te.context: Event partner_offer, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The letters stop coming. So does the money.

event.partner_offer.options.0.label.defa.context: Event partner_offer, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.partner_offer.options.0.success.te.context: Event partner_offer, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: His letters prove good as gold. The partnership pays handsomely.

event.partner_offer.options.1.label.defa.context: Event partner_offer, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.partner_offer.options.2.label.defa.context: Event partner_offer, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.partner_offer.text.default.context: Event partner_offer, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A foreign merchant — silk cuffs, careful eyes — proposes a joint venture: your local knowledge, his distant markets.

event.partner_offer.title.default.context: Event partner_offer, title, faith branch default.

event.peasant_revolt.options.0.failure.t.context: Event peasant_revolt, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Pitchforks in the dark defeat proud steel. You flee your own lands for a season, humiliated.

event.peasant_revolt.options.0.label.def.context: Event peasant_revolt, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.peasant_revolt.options.0.success.e.context: Durable event log for peasant_revolt, authored option 0, success.effects.

event.peasant_revolt.options.0.success.t.context: Event peasant_revolt, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The revolt breaks against your armed men. The Ploughman King hangs at the crossroads.

event.peasant_revolt.options.1.failure.t.context: Event peasant_revolt, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: They take patience for weakness and demand more, emboldened.

event.peasant_revolt.options.1.label.def.context: Event peasant_revolt, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.peasant_revolt.options.1.success.e.context: Durable event log for peasant_revolt, authored option 1, success.effects.

event.peasant_revolt.options.1.success.t.context: Event peasant_revolt, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: You remit the worst taxes; the crowd disperses, grudging but calm. Wise lords bend.

event.peasant_revolt.text.default.context: Event peasant_revolt, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Torches in the night. Your taxmen beaten, your granary seized — the peasants of {province} have risen, led by a man they call the Ploughman King.

event.peasant_revolt.title.default.context: Event peasant_revolt, title, faith branch default.

event.peddler_knock.options.0.label.defa.context: Event peddler_knock, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.peddler_knock.options.1.label.defa.context: Event peddler_knock, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.peddler_knock.text.default.context: Event peddler_knock, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A peddler with a guarded pack and quick eyes asks, very quietly, after “a buyer of unusual things.”

event.peddler_knock.title.default.context: Event peddler_knock, title, faith branch default.

event.pestilence_arrives.options.0.effec.context: Durable event log for pestilence_arrives, authored option 0, effects.

event.pestilence_arrives.options.0.label.context: Event pestilence_arrives, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.pestilence_arrives.text.default.context: Event pestilence_arrives, text, faith branch default.

source.text: It came with the traders, they say. First the fever, then the marks, then the bells. The pestilence has reached {province}.

event.pestilence_arrives.text.muslim.context: Event pestilence_arrives, text, faith branch muslim.

source.text: It came with the traders, they say. First the fever, then the marks, then the wailing. The pestilence has reached {province}.

event.pestilence_arrives.text.pagan.context: Event pestilence_arrives, text, faith branch pagan.

source.text: It came with the traders, they say. First the fever, then the marks, then the pyres. The pestilence has reached {province}.

event.pestilence_arrives.title.default.context: Event pestilence_arrives, title, faith branch default.

event.pestilence_ends.options.0.effects..context: Durable event log for pestilence_ends, authored option 0, effects.

event.pestilence_ends.options.0.label.de.context: Event pestilence_ends, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.pestilence_ends.text.default.context: Event pestilence_ends, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A season passes with no new graves. Thin, wary, the survivors of {province} step into the sun and count who remains.

event.pestilence_ends.title.default.context: Event pestilence_ends, title, faith branch default.

event.pestilence_rages.options.0.failure.context: Event pestilence_rages, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: It finds a crack. The fever takes you.

event.pestilence_rages.options.0.label.d.context: Event pestilence_rages, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.pestilence_rages.options.0.success.context: Event pestilence_rages, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

event.pestilence_rages.options.1.failure.context: Event pestilence_rages, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The dead share their sickness with the living.

event.pestilence_rages.options.1.label.d.context: Event pestilence_rages, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.pestilence_rages.options.1.success.context: Event pestilence_rages, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Grim work, holy work. The village will not forget.

event.pestilence_rages.options.2.effects.context: Durable event log for pestilence_rages, authored option 2, effects.

event.pestilence_rages.options.2.label.d.context: Event pestilence_rages, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.pestilence_rages.text.default.context: Event pestilence_rages, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Carts in the lanes, lime on the doors. Every family has a grave to dig; some have no one left to dig it.

event.pestilence_rages.title.default.context: Event pestilence_rages, title, faith branch default.

event.pilgrimage_call.options.0.effects..context: Durable event log for pilgrimage_call, authored option 0, effects.

event.pilgrimage_call.options.0.label.de.context: Event pilgrimage_call, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Take up the staff and go.

event.pilgrimage_call.options.1.label.de.context: Event pilgrimage_call, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.pilgrimage_call.options.2.label.de.context: Event pilgrimage_call, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.pilgrimage_call.text.default.context: Event pilgrimage_call, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Pilgrims pass through {province}, footsore and shining-eyed, bound for the holy places. Something in you stirs to follow.

event.pilgrimage_call.title.default.context: Event pilgrimage_call, title, faith branch default.

event.player_comes_of_age.options.0.labe.context: Event player_comes_of_age, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.player_comes_of_age.options.1.labe.context: Event player_comes_of_age, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.player_comes_of_age.options.2.labe.context: Event player_comes_of_age, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.player_comes_of_age.options.3.labe.context: Event player_comes_of_age, authored option 3, label, branch default.

event.player_comes_of_age.text.default.context: Event player_comes_of_age, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You are sixteen — grown, in the eyes of {god} and the law. No tutor shaped your years, so what has your family’s household taught you best?

event.player_comes_of_age.title.default.context: Event player_comes_of_age, title, faith branch default.

event.player_educated.options.0.label.de.context: Event player_educated, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: I will do the family proud.

event.player_educated.options.1.label.de.context: Event player_educated, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.player_educated.text.default.context: Event player_educated, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You turn sixteen. The years of lessons are over — whatever your tutors drilled into you, for good or ill, is yours to carry now.

event.player_educated.title.default.context: Event player_educated, title, faith branch default.

event.plot_court_whispers.options.0.fail.context: Event plot_court_whispers, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The whisper is traced back along the chain of mouths — to yours.

event.plot_court_whispers.options.0.labe.context: Event plot_court_whispers, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.plot_court_whispers.options.0.succ.context: Event plot_court_whispers, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your obstacle leaves court under a cloud, and his place in the lord’s regard falls quietly to you.

event.plot_court_whispers.options.1.labe.context: Event plot_court_whispers, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.plot_court_whispers.text.default.context: Event plot_court_whispers, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Months of patience have shaped the hall’s opinion the way water shapes stone. One final whisper will finish it.

event.plot_court_whispers.title.default.context: Event plot_court_whispers, title, faith branch default.

source.text: The Word in the Right Ear

event.plot_discovered.options.0.label.de.context: Event plot_discovered, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.plot_discovered.options.1.failure..context: Event plot_discovered, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Half-ready is not ready. The whole scheme collapses on your head in daylight.

event.plot_discovered.options.1.label.de.context: Event plot_discovered, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.plot_discovered.options.1.success..context: Event plot_discovered, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Half-ready proves ready enough — barely. What you sought, you seize, and the talkers fall silent.

event.plot_discovered.text.default.context: Event plot_discovered, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Someone has talked. Conversations die when you approach; eyes follow you out of rooms. The plot is known — or nearly.

event.plot_discovered.title.default.context: Event plot_discovered, title, faith branch default.

event.plot_locked_chest.options.0.failur.context: Event plot_locked_chest, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The dog remembered its duty after all. You go over the wall torn, and known.

event.plot_locked_chest.options.0.label..context: Event plot_locked_chest, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.plot_locked_chest.options.0.succes.context: Event plot_locked_chest, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Coin — and something better than coin, wrapped in wool at the bottom.

event.plot_locked_chest.options.1.label..context: Event plot_locked_chest, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.plot_locked_chest.text.default.context: Event plot_locked_chest, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The household sleeps; the dog knows you now. The chest waits where the steward believes nobody knows.

event.plot_locked_chest.title.default.context: Event plot_locked_chest, title, faith branch default.

event.plot_ruin_rival.options.0.failure..context: Event plot_ruin_rival, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A thread snaps — a bought man sells you back. The whole village knows whose hand held the knife.

event.plot_ruin_rival.options.0.label.de.context: Event plot_ruin_rival, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.plot_ruin_rival.options.0.success..context: Durable event log for plot_ruin_rival, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Brought a rival low by intrigue.

event.plot_ruin_rival.options.0.success..context: Event plot_ruin_rival, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Debts, rumors, and old friends turn all at once. {rival} is ruined — everyone suspects you, and no one can prove it.

event.plot_ruin_rival.options.1.label.de.context: Event plot_ruin_rival, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Let it go. Mercy — or nerves.

event.plot_ruin_rival.text.default.context: Event plot_ruin_rival, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Every thread is in place and {rival} suspects nothing. One word from you and the web draws tight.

event.plot_ruin_rival.title.default.context: Event plot_ruin_rival, title, faith branch default.

event.plot_skim_taxes.options.0.failure..context: Event plot_skim_taxes, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: An honest clerk — the rarest hazard. The liege’s displeasure arrives with an audit.

event.plot_skim_taxes.options.0.label.de.context: Event plot_skim_taxes, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.plot_skim_taxes.options.0.success..context: Event plot_skim_taxes, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The liege’s clerks stamp it without a second glance. The difference is yours, this year and after.

event.plot_skim_taxes.options.1.label.de.context: Event plot_skim_taxes, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.plot_skim_taxes.text.default.context: Event plot_skim_taxes, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The false ledger is perfect — every hide and hearth accounted for, and a fifth of it quietly missing.

event.plot_skim_taxes.title.default.context: Event plot_skim_taxes, title, faith branch default.

event.plot_spouse_end.options.0.failure..context: Event plot_spouse_end, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The cup is knocked aside — {spouse} reads your face and knows. What lives in your house now is not a marriage but a watch.

event.plot_spouse_end.options.0.label.de.context: Event plot_spouse_end, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.plot_spouse_end.options.0.success..context: Durable event log for plot_spouse_end, authored option 0, success.effects.
Event plot_spouse_end, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: A sudden illness, the neighbors say. The house mourns, and none mourn louder than you.

event.plot_spouse_end.options.1.effects..context: Durable event log for plot_spouse_end, authored option 1, effects.

event.plot_spouse_end.options.1.label.de.context: Event plot_spouse_end, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.plot_spouse_end.text.default.context: Event plot_spouse_end, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Everything is in place: the draught measured, the stair loosened, the witnesses elsewhere. {spouse} suspects nothing. One nod from you and it is done.

event.plot_spouse_end.title.default.context: Event plot_spouse_end, title, faith branch default.

event.plot_tithe_barn.options.0.failure..context: Event plot_tithe_barn, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A new watchman, unbought. You run for the trees and leave your good name behind.

event.plot_tithe_barn.options.0.label.de.context: Event plot_tithe_barn, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.plot_tithe_barn.options.0.success..context: Event plot_tithe_barn, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: By dawn the sacks are hidden and the ledger is none the wiser. Winter holds no fear this year.

event.plot_tithe_barn.options.1.label.de.context: Event plot_tithe_barn, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.plot_tithe_barn.text.default.context: Event plot_tithe_barn, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The watchman is bought, the dogs are fed, and the cart waits in the alder grove. Tonight the lord’s plenty can become yours.

event.plot_tithe_barn.title.default.context: Event plot_tithe_barn, title, faith branch default.

event.poetry_quarrel.options.0.failure.t.context: Event poetry_quarrel, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You stumble on the meter. The laughter is not with you.

event.poetry_quarrel.options.0.label.def.context: Event poetry_quarrel, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Answer with sharper verses of your own.

event.poetry_quarrel.options.0.success.t.context: Event poetry_quarrel, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your reply cuts twice as deep. The gathering roars; his shame will outlive him.

event.poetry_quarrel.options.1.label.def.context: Event poetry_quarrel, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Smile and let the verses die.

event.poetry_quarrel.options.2.failure.t.context: Event poetry_quarrel, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: His friends pull you apart — after the worst of it.

event.poetry_quarrel.options.2.label.def.context: Event poetry_quarrel, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.poetry_quarrel.options.2.success.t.context: Event poetry_quarrel, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: Poetry has its place; so does a good grip. He recants, wheezing.

event.poetry_quarrel.text.default.context: Event poetry_quarrel, text, faith branch default.

source.text: At the evening majlis a braggart recites verses mocking your family — polished, cruel, and already being repeated with delight.

event.poetry_quarrel.title.default.context: Event poetry_quarrel, title, faith branch default.

event.proposal_made.options.0.failure.te.context: Event proposal_made, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The family refuses — politely, but firmly. Perhaps with more standing, or more silver…

event.proposal_made.options.0.label.defa.context: Event proposal_made, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.proposal_made.options.0.success.ef.context: Durable event log for proposal_made, authored option 0, success.effects.

event.proposal_made.options.0.success.te.context: Event proposal_made, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: It is agreed! Before {holy} and kin, you are wed to {suitor}.

event.proposal_made.text.default.context: Event proposal_made, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Families gather, terms are weighed — your standing, your prospects, the size of your purse. You ask for the hand of {suitor}.

event.proposal_made.title.default.context: Event proposal_made, title, faith branch default.

event.quiet_garrison.options.0.label.def.context: Event quiet_garrison, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.quiet_garrison.options.1.failure.t.context: Event quiet_garrison, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The caravan master pays late and short.

event.quiet_garrison.options.1.label.def.context: Event quiet_garrison, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Hire out as a caravan guard.

event.quiet_garrison.options.1.success.t.context: Event quiet_garrison, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

event.quiet_garrison.options.2.label.def.context: Event quiet_garrison, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.quiet_garrison.text.default.context: Event quiet_garrison, text, faith branch default.

source.text: No war, no drills worth the name — just walls, weather, and wages. A soldier’s enemy in peacetime is the calendar.

event.quiet_garrison.title.default.context: Event quiet_garrison, title, faith branch default.

event.raiders_come.options.0.effects.log.context: Durable event log for raiders_come, authored option 0, effects.

event.raiders_come.options.0.label.defau.context: Event raiders_come, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Flee to the woods with what you can carry.

event.raiders_come.options.1.failure.tex.context: Event raiders_come, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The line breaks in moments. You wake wounded among the ashes.

event.raiders_come.options.1.label.defau.context: Event raiders_come, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Stand with the levy at the bridge.

event.raiders_come.options.1.success.eff.context: Durable event log for raiders_come, authored option 1, success.effects.

event.raiders_come.options.1.success.tex.context: Event raiders_come, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Against all odds the bridge holds. The raiders take their dead and go. You are a hero.

event.raiders_come.options.2.failure.tex.context: Event raiders_come, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The church is exactly where they went first.

event.raiders_come.options.2.label.defau.context: Event raiders_come, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Hide in the church and pray.

event.raiders_come.options.2.success.tex.context: Event raiders_come, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: The raiders, laden elsewhere, pass the church by. A miracle, plainly.

event.raiders_come.text.default.context: Event raiders_come, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Dragon-prowed ships ground on the shingle and armed men pour out, moving with terrible practice toward the village and its church.

event.raiders_come.title.default.context: Event raiders_come, title, faith branch default.

event.recovery.options.0.label.default.context: Event recovery, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.recovery.text.default.context: Event recovery, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Strength returns to your limbs at last. The sickness has run its course.

event.recovery.title.default.context: Event recovery, title, faith branch default.

event.relic_found.options.0.failure.text.context: Event relic_found, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The bishop’s examiner declares them sheep bones. Humiliation.

event.relic_found.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event relic_found, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.relic_found.options.0.success.effe.context: Durable event log for relic_found, authored option 0, success.effects.

event.relic_found.options.0.success.text.context: Event relic_found, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Miracles are soon reported. Pilgrims flood in, and the house prospers — as do you.

event.relic_found.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event relic_found, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Bury them again with honest prayers.

event.relic_found.text.default.context: Event relic_found, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Workmen shoring the crypt uncover an ancient coffer: bones, a rusted ring, a scrap of cloth. The prior’s eyes gleam. Relics draw pilgrims — and pilgrims draw silver.

event.relic_found.title.default.context: Event relic_found, title, faith branch default.
