event.retinue_at_door.options.0.label.de.context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.retinue_at_door.options.1.failure..context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A hasty repair fails inspection. They take food in place of payment.

event.retinue_at_door.options.1.label.de.context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.retinue_at_door.options.1.success..context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Straps, rivets, and wheels leave sounder than they arrived.

event.retinue_at_door.options.2.failure..context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Soldiers eat your supper and tell lies for sport.

event.retinue_at_door.options.2.label.de.context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.retinue_at_door.options.2.success..context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: By midnight you know where the banners march and which captain fears whom.

event.retinue_at_door.options.3.failure..context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 3, failure text, branch default.

source.text: He interprets the custom differently, with six hungry men behind him.

event.retinue_at_door.options.3.label.de.context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Cite the custom limiting their demands.

event.retinue_at_door.options.3.success..context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 3, success text, branch default.

source.text: The captain recognizes the words and takes only what is owed.

event.retinue_at_door.options.4.failure..context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 4, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The door gives, then you do. They leave bruises and an empty larder.

event.retinue_at_door.options.4.label.de.context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 4, label, branch default.

event.retinue_at_door.options.4.success..context: Event retinue_at_door, authored option 4, success text, branch default.

source.text: The first man through finds himself back in the mud. The rest decide another roof is easier.

event.retinue_at_door.text.default.context: Event retinue_at_door, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Men wearing the lord’s colors fill the lane. They require food, fodder, and dry floor before they march again — and requirement sounds very much like command.

event.retinue_at_door.title.default.context: Event retinue_at_door, title, faith branch default.

event.rival_scheme.options.0.failure.tex.context: Event rival_scheme, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: They double down, and the crowd murmurs against you.

event.rival_scheme.options.0.label.defau.context: Event rival_scheme, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.rival_scheme.options.0.success.tex.context: Event rival_scheme, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: They stammer and withdraw the words. The village laughs at them.

event.rival_scheme.options.1.label.defau.context: Event rival_scheme, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Let the lie die on its own.

event.rival_scheme.options.2.label.defau.context: Event rival_scheme, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.rival_scheme.text.default.context: Event rival_scheme, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {rival} has been spreading poison about you — theft, blasphemy, worse. People look at you differently now.

event.rival_scheme.title.default.context: Event rival_scheme, title, faith branch default.

source.text: A Knife in the Dark Market

event.save_the_lord.options.0.failure.te.context: Event save_the_lord, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You reach him — then something bursts against your helm. You wake in the surgeons’ tent, honored and broken.

event.save_the_lord.options.0.label.defa.context: Event save_the_lord, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.save_the_lord.options.0.success.ef.context: Durable event log for save_the_lord, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Saved the lord’s life in battle!

event.save_the_lord.options.0.success.te.context: Event save_the_lord, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: You stand over the fallen lord, roaring, until help arrives. He grips your arm: “I will not forget this.”

event.save_the_lord.options.1.label.defa.context: Event save_the_lord, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: A dead lord pays no wages. Keep formation.

event.save_the_lord.text.default.context: Event save_the_lord, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Through the din you see it: {lord} down, horse screaming, enemies closing like crows. No one else is near enough. You are.

event.save_the_lord.title.default.context: Event save_the_lord, title, faith branch default.

event.scriptorium.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event scriptorium, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.scriptorium.options.1.failure.text.context: Event scriptorium, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: “Is that a DOG in the Gospel?” Scraping vellum for a month.

event.scriptorium.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event scriptorium, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.scriptorium.options.1.success.text.context: Event scriptorium, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your golden lions delight the abbot.

event.scriptorium.text.default.context: Event scriptorium, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Cold fingers, aching eyes, and the slow miracle of letters spreading down the page. The abbot watches your copying with interest.

event.scriptorium.title.default.context: Event scriptorium, title, faith branch default.

event.seek_blessing.options.0.desc.defau.context: Event seek_blessing, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: The next harvest will fare better.

event.seek_blessing.options.0.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for seek_blessing, authored option 0, effects.

event.seek_blessing.options.0.label.defa.context: Event seek_blessing, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: A blessing on the fields. (30 piety)

event.seek_blessing.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event seek_blessing, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Grace rides with you into your next battle.

event.seek_blessing.options.1.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for seek_blessing, authored option 1, effects.

event.seek_blessing.options.1.label.defa.context: Event seek_blessing, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: A blessing on the sword. (30 piety)

event.seek_blessing.options.2.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for seek_blessing, authored option 2, effects.

event.seek_blessing.options.2.label.defa.context: Event seek_blessing, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.seek_blessing.options.3.label.defa.context: Event seek_blessing, authored option 3, label, branch default.

event.seek_blessing.options.4.label.defa.context: Event seek_blessing, authored option 4, label, branch default.

event.seek_blessing.text.default.context: Event seek_blessing, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Cool shadow and quiet within the {temple}. The {holy} hears you out, then asks what you would have of {god}.

event.seek_blessing.title.default.context: Event seek_blessing, title, faith branch default.

event.sergeant.options.0.effects.log.def.context: Durable event log for sergeant, authored option 0, effects.

event.sergeant.options.0.label.default.context: Event sergeant, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.sergeant.options.1.label.default.context: Event sergeant, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Responsibility is a slower way to die.

event.sergeant.text.default.context: Event sergeant, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The captain needs a steady hand over the new levies. Your name is spoken.

event.sergeant.title.default.context: Event sergeant, title, faith branch default.

event.sermon.options.0.label.default.context: Event sermon, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.sermon.options.1.label.default.context: Event sermon, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.sermon.text.default.context: Event sermon, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {priest} preaches with unusual fire — of the rich man, the camel, and the needle’s eye.

event.sermon.title.default.context: Event sermon, title, faith branch default.

event.shop_fire.options.0.failure.text.d.context: Event shop_fire, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You save your skin and little else.

event.shop_fire.options.0.label.default.context: Event shop_fire, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Fight the flames for your stock.

event.shop_fire.options.0.success.text.d.context: Event shop_fire, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Scorched but standing. You saved the most of it.

event.shop_fire.options.1.label.default.context: Event shop_fire, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.shop_fire.text.default.context: Event shop_fire, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You wake to shouting and an orange glow. Fire is eating through the workshop quarter, leaping thatch to thatch.

event.shop_fire.title.default.context: Event shop_fire, title, faith branch default.

event.sparring_challenge.options.0.failu.context: Event sparring_challenge, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: It is not about strength. You pay up, aching in new places — and wiser.

event.sparring_challenge.options.0.label.context: Event sparring_challenge, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.sparring_challenge.options.0.succe.context: Event sparring_challenge, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: You catch him older and slower than his stories. The garrison hoots; he pays with a grin.

event.sparring_challenge.options.1.label.context: Event sparring_challenge, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.sparring_challenge.text.default.context: Event sparring_challenge, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A grizzled sergeant taps your shoulder with a practice blade: “Young ones always think it’s about strength. Care to learn otherwise, for a wager?”

event.sparring_challenge.title.default.context: Event sparring_challenge, title, faith branch default.

event.spouse_council.options.0.label.def.context: Event spouse_council, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.spouse_council.options.1.label.def.context: Event spouse_council, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.spouse_council.text.default.context: Event spouse_council, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {spouse} speaks quietly after the hall empties: a shrewd reading of your rivals, your coffers, and your next move.

event.spouse_council.title.default.context: Event spouse_council, title, faith branch default.

event.spring_sowing.options.0.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for spring_sowing, authored option 0, effects.

event.spring_sowing.options.0.label.defa.context: Event spring_sowing, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.spring_sowing.options.1.effects.lo.context: Durable event log for spring_sowing, authored option 1, effects.

event.spring_sowing.options.1.label.defa.context: Event spring_sowing, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.spring_sowing.options.2.label.defa.context: Event spring_sowing, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Sow little, hire out your back instead.

event.spring_sowing.text.default.context: Event spring_sowing, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The thaw has come and the earth turns soft. What goes into the ground now decides who eats next winter.

event.spring_sowing.title.default.context: Event spring_sowing, title, faith branch default.

event.strange_bounty.options.0.failure.t.context: Event strange_bounty, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The lord’s men arrive while your arms are full.

event.strange_bounty.options.0.label.def.context: Event strange_bounty, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.strange_bounty.options.0.success.t.context: Event strange_bounty, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Casks of wine and a purse of foreign silver, safely hidden.

event.strange_bounty.options.0.success.t.context: Event strange_bounty, authored option 0, success text, branch muslim.

source.text: Bolts of dyed cloth and a purse of foreign silver, safely hidden.

event.strange_bounty.options.1.label.def.context: Event strange_bounty, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.strange_bounty.options.2.label.def.context: Event strange_bounty, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.strange_bounty.text.default.context: Event strange_bounty, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A storm-tide leaves a broken ship on the strand — timbers, casks, and a drowned man with rings on his fingers. By law it is the lord’s. By dawn, it is whoever’s got there first.

event.strange_bounty.title.default.context: Event strange_bounty, title, faith branch default.

event.summer_storm.options.0.label.defau.context: Event summer_storm, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.summer_storm.options.1.failure.tex.context: Event summer_storm, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Hail like slingstones. The crop is battered flat.

event.summer_storm.options.1.label.defau.context: Event summer_storm, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.summer_storm.options.1.success.tex.context: Event summer_storm, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: The storm slides past. Your fields glitter, unharmed.

event.summer_storm.text.default.context: Event summer_storm, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Hail-heavy clouds pile up beyond the hills. A summer storm could flatten every stalk you own.

event.summer_storm.title.default.context: Event summer_storm, title, faith branch default.

event.swarm_in_eaves.options.0.failure.t.context: Event swarm_in_eaves, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The swarm takes offense and then takes flight.

event.swarm_in_eaves.options.0.label.def.context: Event swarm_in_eaves, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Hive them with smoke and patience.

event.swarm_in_eaves.options.0.success.t.context: Event swarm_in_eaves, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The queen settles into the basket. By autumn there is honey enough to sell.

event.swarm_in_eaves.options.1.label.def.context: Event swarm_in_eaves, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.swarm_in_eaves.options.2.label.def.context: Event swarm_in_eaves, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Give the first wax and honey to the {temple}.

event.swarm_in_eaves.options.3.label.def.context: Event swarm_in_eaves, authored option 3, label, branch default.

event.swarm_in_eaves.text.default.context: Event swarm_in_eaves, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A cloud of bees settles beneath the eaves, heavy with promise and noise. Honey keeps; wax sells; stings swell.

event.swarm_in_eaves.title.default.context: Event swarm_in_eaves, title, faith branch default.

event.sworn_aid.options.0.label.default.context: Event sworn_aid, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.sworn_aid.options.1.label.default.context: Event sworn_aid, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.sworn_aid.text.default.context: Event sworn_aid, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Word of your hard times reaches {friend}. The oath you swore was not words only: they arrive with a purse and no speeches.

event.sworn_aid.title.default.context: Event sworn_aid, title, faith branch default.

event.tax_collector.options.0.label.defa.context: Event tax_collector, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.tax_collector.options.1.failure.te.context: Event tax_collector, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Bleating betrays you. The fine stings worse than the tax.

event.tax_collector.options.1.label.defa.context: Event tax_collector, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.tax_collector.options.1.success.te.context: Event tax_collector, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: The ledger records one thin goat. The fat one chews safely in the wood.

event.tax_collector.options.2.failure.te.context: Event tax_collector, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: He takes your goods in lieu of coin.

event.tax_collector.options.2.label.defa.context: Event tax_collector, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.tax_collector.options.2.success.te.context: Event tax_collector, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: The collector sighs and moves on.

event.tax_collector.text.default.context: Event tax_collector, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The lord’s man arrives with his ledger and his soldiers, tallying hearths and hens alike.

event.tax_collector.title.default.context: Event tax_collector, title, faith branch default.

event.tend_sick.options.0.failure.text.d.context: Event tend_sick, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

event.tend_sick.options.0.label.default.context: Event tend_sick, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.tend_sick.options.0.success.text.d.context: Event tend_sick, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

event.tend_sick.options.1.label.default.context: Event tend_sick, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Pray for them from a safe distance.

event.tend_sick.text.default.context: Event tend_sick, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Fever season fills the infirmary. The sick call for water, for prayers, for their mothers.

event.tend_sick.title.default.context: Event tend_sick, title, faith branch default.

event.testament_challenge.options.0.fail.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: One phrase slips. The claimant drives a wedge into the uncertainty.

event.testament_challenge.options.0.labe.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.testament_challenge.options.0.succ.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Question follows question; the wording never changes. The testament stands.

event.testament_challenge.options.1.fail.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Under pressure, the witnesses remember different gifts.

event.testament_challenge.options.1.labe.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.testament_challenge.options.1.succ.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Too many honest voices agree for the claimant to overcome them.

event.testament_challenge.options.2.fail.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: One seal is damaged. Suspicion swallows the rest of the evidence.

event.testament_challenge.options.2.labe.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Break the seal and read the inventory.

event.testament_challenge.options.2.succ.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: Nothing is missing and every mark is witnessed. The division proceeds.

event.testament_challenge.options.3.labe.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Admit the proof is uncertain and refer it upward.

event.testament_challenge.options.4.labe.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 4, label, branch default.

source.text: Admit the witnesses are uncertain and refer it upward.

event.testament_challenge.options.5.labe.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 5, label, branch default.

source.text: Admit the inventory is uncertain and refer it upward.

event.testament_challenge.options.6.fail.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 6, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Another witness names the bargain aloud. The court turns on you.

event.testament_challenge.options.6.labe.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 6, label, branch default.

event.testament_challenge.options.6.succ.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 6, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your chosen version becomes the court’s version. The claimant pays well.

event.testament_challenge.options.7.labe.context: Event testament_challenge, authored option 7, label, branch default.

source.text: Repent and tell the court about the bribe.

event.testament_challenge.text.default.context: Event testament_challenge, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A kinsman rejects the last words and demands the goods. The local court wants something firmer than grief.

event.testament_challenge.title.default.context: Event testament_challenge, title, faith branch default.

event.title_request.options.0.failure.te.context: Event title_request, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: “In time,” says the liege, meaning never. Courtiers hide their smiles.

event.title_request.options.0.label.defa.context: Event title_request, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.title_request.options.0.success.ef.context: Durable event log for title_request, authored option 0, success.effects.

source.text: Granted a higher title by the liege!

event.title_request.options.0.success.te.context: Event title_request, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The liege nods slowly. “It is earned.” New lands are added to your charge — and a rich gift to the liege’s chest seals the investiture.

event.title_request.text.default.context: Event title_request, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You stand before your liege’s seat and ask, with every courtesy, for greater lands and title.

event.title_request.title.default.context: Event title_request, title, faith branch default.

event.town_elder.options.0.failure.text..context: Event town_elder, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: An older name edges you out. Next time.

event.town_elder.options.0.label.default.context: Event town_elder, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.town_elder.options.0.success.effec.context: Durable event log for town_elder, authored option 0, success.effects.

event.town_elder.options.0.success.text..context: Event town_elder, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: They raise you to the council bench. Small power, but power.

event.town_elder.options.1.label.default.context: Event town_elder, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.town_elder.text.default.context: Event town_elder, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The townsfolk mutter that the council needs a man of sense — your name comes up more than once.

event.town_elder.title.default.context: Event town_elder, title, faith branch default.

event.vassal_demand.options.0.label.defa.context: Event vassal_demand, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.vassal_demand.options.1.failure.te.context: Event vassal_demand, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: He storms out. Soon his men raid your borderlands.

event.vassal_demand.options.1.label.defa.context: Event vassal_demand, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.vassal_demand.options.1.success.te.context: Event vassal_demand, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: He blusters, bows, and yields. The hall takes note.

event.vassal_demand.options.2.failure.te.context: Event vassal_demand, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You make an enemy for life, and other vassals mutter.

event.vassal_demand.options.2.label.defa.context: Event vassal_demand, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.vassal_demand.options.2.success.te.context: Event vassal_demand, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: Broken before the court, he will never trouble you again.

event.vassal_demand.text.default.context: Event vassal_demand, text, faith branch default.

source.text: One of your sworn men arrives with too many retainers and too few courtesies, demanding lower dues and a seat at your right hand.

event.vassal_demand.title.default.context: Event vassal_demand, title, faith branch default.

event.vassal_feud.options.0.failure.text.context: Event vassal_feud, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Both hear favoritism in your words. Both leave sulking.

event.vassal_feud.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event vassal_feud, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.vassal_feud.options.0.success.text.context: Event vassal_feud, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Your Solomonic ruling pleases both; they leave as uneasy friends.

event.vassal_feud.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event vassal_feud, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.vassal_feud.text.default.context: Event vassal_feud, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Two of your sworn men feud over a boundary mill — each demands you judge for him, and each watches the other’s face at your board.

event.vassal_feud.title.default.context: Event vassal_feud, title, faith branch default.

event.vassal_petition.options.0.label.de.context: Event vassal_petition, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.vassal_petition.options.1.label.de.context: Event vassal_petition, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.vassal_petition.text.default.context: Event vassal_petition, text, faith branch default.

source.text: One of your sworn men kneels at your gate: debts press him hard, and only your generosity stands between his family and ruin.

event.vassal_petition.title.default.context: Event vassal_petition, title, faith branch default.

event.vassal_revoke.options.0.failure.te.context: Event vassal_revoke, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: “Come and take it,” he answers, and rides home to raise his spears.

event.vassal_revoke.options.0.label.defa.context: Event vassal_revoke, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Demand the surrender of the fief.

event.vassal_revoke.options.0.success.te.context: Event vassal_revoke, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: He bows stiffly and yields. The court notes your firmness — and his restraint.

event.vassal_revoke.options.1.label.defa.context: Event vassal_revoke, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.vassal_revoke.text.default.context: Event vassal_revoke, text, faith branch default.

source.text: You summon {rulername} of {rname} and demand the fief back into your own hand. Such a demand is lawful — but law and gratitude are different things.

event.vassal_revoke.title.default.context: Event vassal_revoke, title, faith branch default.

event.vassal_revolt.options.0.label.defa.context: Event vassal_revolt, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.vassal_revolt.options.1.label.defa.context: Event vassal_revolt, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.vassal_revolt.text.default.context: Event vassal_revolt, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {rulername} of {rname} sends back your oath-knot in pieces: he will pay no more, kneel no more. His spears are sharpening.

event.vassal_revolt.title.default.context: Event vassal_revolt, title, faith branch default.

event.vassal_tax_refusal.options.0.label.context: Event vassal_tax_refusal, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.vassal_tax_refusal.options.1.label.context: Event vassal_tax_refusal, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.vassal_tax_refusal.text.default.context: Event vassal_tax_refusal, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The season’s tallies come in — and one of your vassals has sent, instead of silver, a letter of excuses as long as your arm.

event.vassal_tax_refusal.title.default.context: Event vassal_tax_refusal, title, faith branch default.

event.village_festival.options.0.label.d.context: Event village_festival, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.village_festival.options.1.failure.context: Event village_festival, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You eat dirt in front of the whole village. They cheer anyway.

event.village_festival.options.1.label.d.context: Event village_festival, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.village_festival.options.1.success.context: Event village_festival, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: You pin the miller’s enormous son to roars of delight.

event.village_festival.options.2.label.d.context: Event village_festival, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.village_festival.options.3.label.d.context: Event village_festival, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Sell sweets and sherbet to the crowd.

event.village_festival.text.default.context: Event village_festival, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Garlands on the well, a lamb on the spit, and the musicians already flushed with cheer. {province} forgets its burdens for a day.

event.village_festival.title.default.context: Event village_festival, title, faith branch default.

event.visit_city.options.0.failure.text..context: Event visit_city, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A cutpurse thinner than a shadow. You feel the lightness at the gate.

event.visit_city.options.0.label.default.context: Event visit_city, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.visit_city.options.0.success.text..context: Event visit_city, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The great market swallows all you brought and asks for more.

event.visit_city.options.1.label.default.context: Event visit_city, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.visit_city.options.2.failure.text..context: Event visit_city, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Stewards and secretaries, all day. The great remain unseen.

event.visit_city.options.2.label.default.context: Event visit_city, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.visit_city.options.2.success.text..context: Event visit_city, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: A door opens; a name is taken down. Doors remember.

event.visit_city.options.3.failure.text..context: Event visit_city, authored option 3, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The work went to harder men — after one of them rearranged your face.

event.visit_city.options.3.label.default.context: Event visit_city, authored option 3, label, branch default.

event.visit_city.options.3.success.text..context: Event visit_city, authored option 3, success text, branch default.

source.text: Three nights guarding a nervous silk merchant. The pay is very good.

event.visit_city.options.4.label.default.context: Event visit_city, authored option 4, label, branch default.

event.visit_city.options.5.label.default.context: Event visit_city, authored option 5, label, branch default.

source.text: Browse the dealers in rare goods.

event.visit_city.options.6.label.default.context: Event visit_city, authored option 6, label, branch default.

event.visit_city.options.7.label.default.context: Event visit_city, authored option 7, label, branch default.

event.visit_city.text.default.context: Event visit_city, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Gates like cliffs, streets like rivers. In {settlement} a fortune is made or lost every day, and nobody asks where you were born — only what you carry.

event.visit_city.title.default.context: Event visit_city, title, faith branch default.

event.visit_town.options.0.failure.text..context: Event visit_town, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A slow market day. You barely cover the road.

event.visit_town.options.0.label.default.context: Event visit_town, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.visit_town.options.0.success.text..context: Event visit_town, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Good prices and quick hands. You come home heavier by a few coins.

event.visit_town.options.1.failure.text..context: Event visit_town, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Too many hands, too little work.

event.visit_town.options.1.label.default.context: Event visit_town, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.visit_town.options.1.success.text..context: Event visit_town, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: A wall wants mending and a wagon wants loading. Honest coin.

event.visit_town.options.2.label.default.context: Event visit_town, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.visit_town.options.3.failure.text..context: Event visit_town, authored option 3, failure text, branch default.

source.text: No one is hiring swords this season.

event.visit_town.options.3.label.default.context: Event visit_town, authored option 3, label, branch default.

event.visit_town.options.3.success.text..context: Event visit_town, authored option 3, success text, branch default.

source.text: A merchant train needs spears for the road. Easy duty, fair pay.

event.visit_town.options.4.label.default.context: Event visit_town, authored option 4, label, branch default.

event.visit_town.options.5.label.default.context: Event visit_town, authored option 5, label, branch default.

event.visit_town.options.6.label.default.context: Event visit_town, authored option 6, label, branch default.

event.visit_town.text.default.context: Event visit_town, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Market stalls, a smithy’s clangor, and strangers enough that no one stares. {settlement} has walls of a sort, laws of a sort, and coin for those who know their trade.

event.visit_town.title.default.context: Event visit_town, title, faith branch default.

event.visit_village.options.0.label.defa.context: Event visit_village, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.visit_village.options.1.label.defa.context: Event visit_village, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.visit_village.options.2.label.defa.context: Event visit_village, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.visit_village.options.3.label.defa.context: Event visit_village, authored option 3, label, branch default.

event.visit_village.options.4.label.defa.context: Event visit_village, authored option 4, label, branch default.

event.visit_village.options.5.label.defa.context: Event visit_village, authored option 5, label, branch default.

event.visit_village.text.default.context: Event visit_village, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Mud lanes, low roofs, and every face turning to mark the newcomer. {settlement} is small enough that nothing here goes unnoticed — including you.

event.visit_village.title.default.context: Event visit_village, title, faith branch default.

event.wandering_scholar.options.0.label..context: Event wandering_scholar, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.wandering_scholar.options.1.label..context: Event wandering_scholar, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: A meal and a bed for the night.

event.wandering_scholar.options.2.label..context: Event wandering_scholar, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.wandering_scholar.text.default.context: Event wandering_scholar, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A traveling scholar — threadbare, sharp-eyed, trailing manuscripts — asks leave to work beneath your roof for a season.

event.wandering_scholar.title.default.context: Event wandering_scholar, title, faith branch default.

event.wandering_skald.options.0.label.de.context: Event wandering_skald, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Buy him ale for the news.

event.wandering_skald.options.1.label.de.context: Event wandering_skald, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Buy him supper for the news.

event.wandering_skald.options.2.failure..context: Event wandering_skald, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: He improves your story until it is no longer yours, then leaves.

event.wandering_skald.options.2.label.de.context: Event wandering_skald, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.wandering_skald.options.2.success..context: Event wandering_skald, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: He weaves your deeds into his tale. Your name will travel roads you never will.

event.wandering_skald.text.default.context: Event wandering_skald, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A traveling singer works the crowd by the fire — wars in far lands, kings dead and crowned, and a rumor for every purse.

event.wandering_skald.title.default.context: Event wandering_skald, title, faith branch default.

event.war_council.options.0.desc.default.context: Event war_council, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Force a decision in the field — only while they have no host raised. A fielded enemy must be hunted on the map.

event.war_council.options.0.failure.text.context: Event war_council, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The day goes against you. You are carried back with the remnant of your host — alive, and little else.

event.war_council.options.0.label.defaul.context: Event war_council, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.war_council.options.0.success.text.context: Event war_council, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The lines meet with a sound like a falling forest — and it is theirs that breaks. The field is yours.

event.war_council.options.1.desc.default.context: Event war_council, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: March on their army in the field — battle joins when you catch it.

event.war_council.options.1.label.defaul.context: Event war_council, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.war_council.options.2.desc.default.context: Event war_council, authored option 2, desc, branch default.

source.text: Ladders, mines, and patience — your host must stand in the target province; three seasons of siege take the prize. Beware sorties.

event.war_council.options.2.label.defaul.context: Event war_council, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.war_council.options.3.desc.default.context: Event war_council, authored option 3, desc, branch default.

source.text: Burn and take — weaken them before the next battle.

event.war_council.options.3.failure.text.context: Event war_council, authored option 3, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Their riders were waiting at the ford. Your raiders return fewer, poorer, and ashamed.

event.war_council.options.3.label.defaul.context: Event war_council, authored option 3, label, branch default.

event.war_council.options.3.success.text.context: Event war_council, authored option 3, success text, branch default.

source.text: Granaries burn and herds change owners. Their war grows dearer by the day — and yours a little richer.

event.war_council.options.4.desc.default.context: Event war_council, authored option 4, desc, branch default.

source.text: The host mends and your borders are relieved — but no ground is gained.

event.war_council.options.4.label.defaul.context: Event war_council, authored option 4, label, branch default.

event.war_council.options.5.desc.default.context: Event war_council, authored option 5, desc, branch default.

source.text: End the war now, at a price.

event.war_council.options.5.label.defaul.context: Event war_council, authored option 5, label, branch default.

event.war_council.text.default.context: Event war_council, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Maps, candle-stubs, and hard-eyed captains. The war against {enemy} must be given its next move — and the men must see you certain of it.

event.war_council.title.default.context: Event war_council, title, faith branch default.

event.war_defense_muster.options.0.desc..context: Event war_defense_muster, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A company of ~150 hard men, promptly paid (4 gold a season).

event.war_defense_muster.options.0.effec.context: Durable event log for war_defense_muster, authored option 0, effects.

event.war_defense_muster.options.0.label.context: Event war_defense_muster, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.war_defense_muster.options.1.desc..context: Event war_defense_muster, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A greater levy — but the fields will miss them.

event.war_defense_muster.options.1.effec.context: Durable event log for war_defense_muster, authored option 1, effects.

source.text: Called a great levy to the defense.

event.war_defense_muster.options.1.label.context: Event war_defense_muster, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.war_defense_muster.options.2.label.context: Event war_defense_muster, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.war_defense_muster.text.default.context: Event war_defense_muster, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {enemy} marches on your lands. Roads fill with carts and rumor; your captains stand in the yard, waiting for orders.

event.war_defense_muster.title.default.context: Event war_defense_muster, title, faith branch default.

event.war_deserters.options.0.label.defa.context: Event war_deserters, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Hunt them down and hang one.

event.war_deserters.options.1.desc.defau.context: Event war_deserters, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

event.war_deserters.options.1.label.defa.context: Event war_deserters, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Promise double pay at war’s end.

event.war_deserters.options.2.label.defa.context: Event war_deserters, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.war_deserters.text.default.context: Event war_deserters, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Morning count comes up short again — men slipping home to their harvests, their wives, their unfinished lives. The ones who stay are watching you.

event.war_deserters.title.default.context: Event war_deserters, title, faith branch default.

event.war_grain_seller.options.0.desc.de.context: Event war_grain_seller, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

event.war_grain_seller.options.0.label.d.context: Event war_grain_seller, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.war_grain_seller.options.1.failure.context: Event war_grain_seller, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: His guards were better than his prices. Men are hurt for nothing.

event.war_grain_seller.options.1.label.d.context: Event war_grain_seller, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.war_grain_seller.options.1.success.context: Event war_grain_seller, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: The host eats; the merchant curses your name in three ports.

event.war_grain_seller.options.2.label.d.context: Event war_grain_seller, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: The men can tighten their belts.

event.war_grain_seller.text.default.context: Event war_grain_seller, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A merchant with excellent timing and no shame offers grain enough to keep the host fed — at thrice the honest price.

event.war_grain_seller.title.default.context: Event war_grain_seller, title, faith branch default.

event.war_muster.options.0.desc.default.context: Event war_muster, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: A company of ~150 hard men, promptly paid (4 gold a season).

event.war_muster.options.0.effects.log.d.context: Durable event log for war_muster, authored option 0, effects.

event.war_muster.options.0.label.default.context: Event war_muster, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.war_muster.options.1.desc.default.context: Event war_muster, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: A greater levy — but the fields will miss them.

event.war_muster.options.1.effects.log.d.context: Durable event log for war_muster, authored option 1, effects.

source.text: Called a great levy to war.

event.war_muster.options.1.label.default.context: Event war_muster, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.war_muster.options.2.label.default.context: Event war_muster, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.war_muster.text.default.context: Event war_muster, text, faith branch default.

source.text: War with {enemy}. The host musters at your banner even now — farmers, spears, and pride. Will you swell its ranks before it marches? And mark this: {target} falls only to a siege — your host must stand upon its walls while the council presses the works.

event.war_muster.title.default.context: Event war_muster, title, faith branch default.

event.war_tribute_offer.options.0.desc.d.context: Event war_tribute_offer, authored option 0, desc, branch default.

source.text: Their gold, your glory — the war ends here.

event.war_tribute_offer.options.0.effect.context: Durable event log for war_tribute_offer, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Took the enemy’s tribute and ended the war.

event.war_tribute_offer.options.0.label..context: Event war_tribute_offer, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.war_tribute_offer.options.1.desc.d.context: Event war_tribute_offer, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: Keep your host standing on {target} and press the siege at each war council — three seasons of works take it.

event.war_tribute_offer.options.1.effect.context: Durable event log for war_tribute_offer, authored option 1, effects.

source.text: Refused tribute; the war goes on.

event.war_tribute_offer.options.1.label..context: Event war_tribute_offer, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.war_tribute_offer.text.default.context: Event war_tribute_offer, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Beaten in the field again and again, {enemy} sends envoys under a white flag: silver enough to end this war today, if you sheath the sword. But {target} still stands untaken — and its walls will not fall to a purse.

event.war_tribute_offer.title.default.context: Event war_tribute_offer, title, faith branch default.

event.wardeath_friend.options.0.effects..context: Durable event log for wardeath_friend, authored option 0, effects.

event.wardeath_friend.options.0.label.de.context: Event wardeath_friend, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.wardeath_friend.options.1.label.de.context: Event wardeath_friend, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.wardeath_friend.options.2.label.de.context: Event wardeath_friend, authored option 2, label, branch default.

source.text: Keep vigil by the grave until dawn.

event.wardeath_friend.text.default.context: Event wardeath_friend, text, faith branch default.

source.text: {friend} does not answer the roll. You find them at last among the rows of the dead, looking almost surprised.

event.wardeath_friend.title.default.context: Event wardeath_friend, title, faith branch default.

source.text: An Empty Place at the Fire

event.wed_above.options.0.label.default.context: Event wed_above, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.wed_above.options.1.label.default.context: Event wed_above, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: You wed {spouse}, not the whole house.

event.wed_above.text.default.context: Event wed_above, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The kin of {spouse} never let you forget the height from which they stooped. Now a cousin writes: the family expects a favor of its new… relation.

event.wed_above.title.default.context: Event wed_above, title, faith branch default.

event.wed_below.options.0.label.default.context: Event wed_below, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Let them talk. You chose well.

event.wed_below.options.1.label.default.context: Event wed_below, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.wed_below.text.default.context: Event wed_below, text, faith branch default.

source.text: At the well and in the hall they whisper it: you married beneath yourself. {spouse} pretends not to hear.

event.wed_below.title.default.context: Event wed_below, title, faith branch default.

event.wedding_gift.options.0.label.defau.context: Event wedding_gift, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.wedding_gift.text.default.context: Event wedding_gift, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Well-wishers bring gifts to the new couple — a pig, a bolt of cloth, a few coins pressed into your palm.

event.wedding_gift.text.jewish.context: Event wedding_gift, text, faith branch jewish.

source.text: Well-wishers bring gifts to the new couple — a lamb, a bolt of cloth, a few coins pressed into your palm.

event.wedding_gift.text.muslim.context: Event wedding_gift, text, faith branch muslim.

source.text: Well-wishers bring gifts to the new couple — a lamb, a bolt of cloth, a few coins pressed into your palm.

event.wedding_gift.title.default.context: Event wedding_gift, title, faith branch default.

event.widow_settlement.options.0.effects.context: Durable event log for widow_settlement, authored option 0, effects.

source.text: Received a settlement from the house of {late}.

event.widow_settlement.options.0.label.d.context: Event widow_settlement, authored option 0, label, branch default.

source.text: Take what is owed, with dignity.

event.widow_settlement.options.1.desc.de.context: Event widow_settlement, authored option 1, desc, branch default.

source.text: The old custom names a widow’s third. Their clerks will argue.

event.widow_settlement.options.1.failure.context: Event widow_settlement, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: Papers are produced; clerks smile thinly. You leave with hard words and an empty purse.

event.widow_settlement.options.1.label.d.context: Event widow_settlement, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.widow_settlement.options.1.success.context: Durable event log for widow_settlement, authored option 1, success.effects.

source.text: Pressed the house of {late} for the full portion.

event.widow_settlement.options.1.success.context: Event widow_settlement, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Grumbling, they pay it out — the full portion, as the old custom names it.

event.widow_settlement.options.2.effects.context: Durable event log for widow_settlement, authored option 2, effects.

source.text: Refused the silver of the house of {late}.

event.widow_settlement.options.2.label.d.context: Event widow_settlement, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.widow_settlement.text.default.context: Event widow_settlement, text, faith branch default.

source.text: The mourning is done, and the kin of {late} send a clerk with a strongbox and papers. What was settled on your marriage must now be paid out — though their faces say they would rather not.

event.widow_settlement.title.default.context: Event widow_settlement, title, faith branch default.

event.winter_fever.options.0.effects.log.context: Durable event log for winter_fever, authored option 0, effects.

event.winter_fever.options.0.label.defau.context: Event winter_fever, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.winter_fever.options.1.failure.tex.context: Event winter_fever, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: You collapse. The sickness digs deep.

event.winter_fever.options.1.label.defau.context: Event winter_fever, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.winter_fever.options.1.success.tex.context: Event winter_fever, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: You sweat it out at your labors.

event.winter_fever.text.default.context: Event winter_fever, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A wet cough settles in your chest as the cold bites. Half the village is abed with it.

event.winter_fever.title.default.context: Event winter_fever, title, faith branch default.

event.wolves.options.0.failure.text.defa.context: Event wolves, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The wolf leaves you a scar to remember it by.

event.wolves.options.0.label.default.context: Event wolves, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.wolves.options.0.success.text.defa.context: Event wolves, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: You come home dragging a grey carcass. The village drinks your health.

event.wolves.options.0.success.text.musl.context: Event wolves, authored option 0, success text, branch muslim.

source.text: You come home dragging a grey carcass. The village feasts you as a hero.

event.wolves.options.1.label.default.context: Event wolves, authored option 1, label, branch default.

source.text: Pen the flock and wait for spring.

event.wolves.text.default.context: Event wolves, text, faith branch default.

source.text: Tracks in the snow, big as your palm. Something has been at the sheep, and the dogs whine at dusk.

event.wolves.title.default.context: Event wolves, title, faith branch default.

event.words_before_dawn.options.0.failur.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

source.text: By dawn, three vital words have three possible meanings.

event.words_before_dawn.options.0.label..context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.words_before_dawn.options.0.succes.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: The phrasing fixes itself in your mind as if written there.

event.words_before_dawn.options.1.failur.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 1, failure text, branch default.

source.text: One arrives too late; the other is kin to the expected claimant.

event.words_before_dawn.options.1.label..context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.words_before_dawn.options.1.succes.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 1, success text, branch default.

source.text: Three households hear the same words and agree upon them.

event.words_before_dawn.options.2.failur.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 2, failure text, branch default.

source.text: A chest is already open and nobody admits touching it.

event.words_before_dawn.options.2.label..context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 2, label, branch default.

event.words_before_dawn.options.2.succes.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 2, success text, branch default.

source.text: Every tool and animal is counted before anyone can spirit it away.

event.words_before_dawn.options.3.failur.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 3, failure text, branch default.

source.text: The offer was a test. Your reputation reaches the door before you do.

event.words_before_dawn.options.3.label..context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 3, label, branch default.

source.text: Shade the wording for a promised fee.

event.words_before_dawn.options.3.succes.context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 3, success text, branch default.

source.text: The favored claimant presses three coins into your hand.

event.words_before_dawn.options.4.label..context: Event words_before_dawn, authored option 4, label, branch default.

event.words_before_dawn.text.default.context: Event words_before_dawn, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A dying householder names who should receive the best beast, the tools, the household goods, and a final gift to the {temple}. There is no clerk — only breath, witnesses, and very little time.

event.words_before_dawn.title.default.context: Event words_before_dawn, title, faith branch default.

event.wreck_auction.options.0.failure.te.context: Event wreck_auction, authored option 0, failure text, branch default.

event.wreck_auction.options.0.label.defa.context: Event wreck_auction, authored option 0, label, branch default.

event.wreck_auction.options.0.success.te.context: Event wreck_auction, authored option 0, success text, branch default.

source.text: Under the ruined top layer: silk, barely touched.

event.wreck_auction.options.1.label.defa.context: Event wreck_auction, authored option 1, label, branch default.

event.wreck_auction.text.default.context: Event wreck_auction, text, faith branch default.

source.text: A storm-broken cargo goes under the hammer, sight unseen: sodden bales that might be ruined wool — or sea-stained silk.

event.wreck_auction.title.default.context: Event wreck_auction, title, faith branch default.

legend.condition.default.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Lived. Died. The chronicle splits the difference.

legend.condition.early.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Gone before their time; the time was never consulted.

legend.condition.emperor.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Ruled an empire; the empire has been formally notified.

legend.condition.famous.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: So famous that strangers are mourning professionally.

legend.condition.many_children.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Leaves {count} children and not one quiet meal behind.

legend.condition.no_children.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Leaves no children; the gossips needed no invitation.

legend.condition.old.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Died full of years and of opinions about the young.

legend.condition.poor.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Died owing a goat. The goat has not forgotten.

legend.condition.rich.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Died rich. The coffers were pried from still-warm fingers.

legend.condition.serf.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Born a serf, died a serf, and outstubborned everyone in between.

legend.condition.sickness.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Complained about the leech bill until the very end.

legend.condition.very_old.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Reached {age}, an age the neighbors called showing off.

legend.condition.young.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Gone at {age}; the chronicle leaves most of the page blank.

legend.death.age.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

cases.early: {name} dies in {year} AD, aged {age} — before their time.
cases.old: {name} dies in {year} AD, aged {age} — full of years.
cases.other: {name} dies in {year} AD, aged {age}.
cases.sickness: {name} dies in {year} AD, aged {age} — taken by sickness.

legend.death.wounds.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Wounds and sickness prove too much. {name} does not see another season.

legend.skill.dip.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Could talk a beggar into lending money, and did.

legend.skill.int.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Knew everyone’s secrets and took the best ones along.

legend.skill.lea.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Read more books than the parish owned.

legend.skill.mar.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Settled most disputes by winning them.

legend.skill.ste.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Counted everything. The graveyard steward sends regards.

legend.trait.ambitious.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Wanted more. Got a grave, which is technically more.

legend.trait.brave.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Never once ran. Running would have helped, but still.

legend.trait.chaste.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Pure to the end, and faintly smug about it.

legend.trait.comely.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: The fairest burial the parish has managed in years.

legend.trait.content.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Wanted nothing, received exactly that, and was pleased.

legend.trait.craven.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Attended every battle from the safety of the rear.

legend.trait.cruel.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Feared in life; the mourning is largely procedural.

legend.trait.cynical.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Expected nothing of the afterlife and declines to be surprised.

legend.trait.deceitful.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Died insisting they felt perfectly fine.

legend.trait.drunkard.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: The cup won in the end, exactly as the cup predicted.

legend.trait.dull.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Untroubled by thought; slipped away in the absence of one.

legend.trait.excommunicated.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Buried at a crossroads by popular ecclesiastical demand.

legend.trait.frail.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Fragile in body, punctual in the end.

legend.trait.generous.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Gave away everything except the debts.

legend.trait.genius.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Knew everything except how to stay.

legend.trait.gluttonous.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Out-ate every harvest set before them, and several that were not.

legend.trait.greedy.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Left instructions about the gold. Nobody can find them.

legend.trait.homely.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: A face only a mother could love, and she kept her counsel.

legend.trait.honest.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Never told a lie. The family found this exhausting.

legend.trait.humble.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Asked for a plain funeral and was, for once, obeyed.

legend.trait.kind.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Genuinely mourned, which surprised no one more than them.

legend.trait.kinslayer.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: The family attended the grave at a careful distance.

legend.trait.literate.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Read everything in reach, including, twice, a menu.

legend.trait.lustful.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Mourned by more households than the family admits.

legend.trait.maimed.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Broken in body, never once in complaint.

legend.trait.one_eyed.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Lost an eye, gained a story, told it ten thousand times.

legend.trait.patient.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Waited for everything. Waited for this, too.

legend.trait.pilgrim.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Walked the holy roads; took the last one without luggage.

legend.trait.proud.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Bowed to no one. The grave accepts all bows as given.

legend.trait.quick.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Quick of wit, and quicker to mention it.

legend.trait.robust.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Never ill a day. The last day declined to comment.

legend.trait.scarred.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Wore their scars like debts others owed. All settled now.

legend.trait.sickly.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: So often ill that the end registered as a scheduling change.

legend.trait.strong.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Could lift an ox. The ox sends no condolences.

legend.trait.temperate.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Moderate in all things, including, at the last, breathing.

legend.trait.veteran.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Survived the shield-wall. The years fought sneakier.

legend.trait.wrathful.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Died angry. The wake was quieter than the life.

legend.trait.zealous.context: Durable message descriptor; English source remains at its callsite.

source.text: Corrected priests on doctrine; has presumably gone to check.

source.text: Sawdust, burns, and a trade worth silver. Guilds and town councils are ladders for those who can climb.
You are {name}, apprenticed to a master of the craft in {province}. Your hands are learning what your purse will someday know.
A drafty tower, a hundred spears, and a liege watching your loyalty. The traditional start.
You are {name}, Baron in {province}, sworn to {realm}. Your tower is small and your ambitions are welcome to be otherwise.
A small plot, a strong back, and your own name in the rolls. Freedom is a start — now make it into wealth.
You are {name}, a free farmer of {province}. Your land is small, your debts are few, and your ambitions need not be.
Gentle blood, empty purse. A horse, a blade, and admittance to halls where futures are granted.
You are {name}, gently born and poorly landed. The gentry’s door is open; the baron’s hall is the next to force.
The path of learning — the only career open to talent regardless of birth. In Christian lands a monk bound for the mitre; in Muslim lands a madrasa student bound for the qadi’s seat.
You are Brother {name} of {province}, newly sworn. Letters, prayer, and patience can raise a nobody higher than any sword — but a dynasty will need... arrangements.

You are {name}, a student of the madrasa of {province}. Ink, memory, and the law can raise a nobody higher than any sword — and unlike the Christians’ monks, a scholar may yet marry and found a house.
Bound to the soil, owning nothing — not even yourself. Every step upward must be bought, begged, or bled for.
You are {name}, a serf of {province}. The lord owns your labor; the church owns your Sundays; the soil will own your bones — unless you claw your way to something more.
Paid to stand where the arrows land. Glory is quick, death is quicker, and lords remember men who save them.
You are {name}, a spear in the service of the lord of {province}. Wages are thin, but battlefields are where nobodies become somebodies.

source.text: 10 gold in gifts; a pact of peace holds two years, and your diplomacy carries the rest.
A plot claims your daily focus until it is ready to spring — and every day of weaving risks discovery.
A writ written and witnessed; the ketubah owed to {name} is paid out. (spends the day)
Ask the liege to strip a disgraced neighbor and invest you with his county. Service in the liege’s wars: {service}.
Ask {lord} for lands and a banner.
Be born as no one. The centuries flow and the realms war, rise, and ruin while you simply watch the map. No character, no events, no interruptions.
Bind your friend to your house by oath — for life.
Bind {name} to your house by oath — for life.
Blood lines run downward — each brood hangs beneath its parents. † marks the dead. Click a face to open their sheet.
Blood lines run downward — each brood hangs beneath its parents. † marks the dead. Tap a face to open their sheet.
Bring your piety to the {temple} and ask for grace.
But a house is more than one life. Who carries the name onward?
Command your host in war (it marches only while standing idle — a route you tap by hand always plays out, and a halted host holds):
Deeds — done at once (each spends the day)
Families willing to hear an offer for {name}’s hand:
Focus — pursued every day until changed
French, German, Italian, and Spanish are AI-generated Preview translations and may contain errors.
Fund learned men; scholarship accrues toward innovations. (Scholarship: {amount})
Held by {realm} ({counties}) · they can field ~{theirs} against your ~{yours}
How quickly the days flow while time runs — on a keyboard, −/+ change it at any time.
How quickly the days flow while time runs.

Land is taken only by siege: march your host onto the prize and keep it standing there — press the siege at each season’s war council, and after three the county is yours. Field victories bring the enemy to the table, nothing more.
No neighboring lord stands low enough in your liege’s favor ({favor} or less). Time brings disgrace — wait for it.
No province chosen — a random home will be found.
None — this land feeds no duchy or crown.
Open their sheet and your dealings with them
Or paste mod JSON here, e.g. {example}
Paste a start code or world seed
Path: prosper, buy land, and a manor ({gold} gold + {prestige} prestige) to join the gentry. Soldiering and the church offer other roads.
Path: save {gold} gold (or win your lord’s favor) to buy freedom.
Pay {gold} gold to be struck from the serf-roll.
Property passes to your heirs — a household built up over generations is its own kind of greatness.
Pursue marriage with {name}: court them daily, then propose.
Raise your levies and hired companies as a field host — ~{men} men at your seat. Then tap the host on the map and tap a province to march it.
Renounce your liege and raise your own banner — it means war.
Renounce {liege} and raise your own banner — it means war.
Scholarship: {amount} — earned by patronizing scholars, libraries, and learned guests. Innovations persist across the generations.
Scholarship: {amount} — spend it on advances that outlive you.
See the whole family drawn as a tree
See their sheet and your dealings with them

Set a daily focus (it continues until you change it) and act on deeds when the moment is right. Press Space to let the days flow — and again to pause. F skips to the next happening. Watch the Deeds tab for your path upward.
Spoken before witnesses — and the mahr owed to {name} is paid out. (spends the day)
Tap a treasure to see its powers — or to sell or gift it.
The house of {dynasty} passes out of memory, as all things must.
The liege strips only a man he already despises — and only for a vassal he loves. Your service in his wars: {service}.
Trackless {terrain}. No lord rules here — it feeds no duchy or crown.
Undermine your rival by fair means or foul.
Undermine {name} by fair means or foul.
While the days flow (or fast-forward), the chosen kinds of events resolve themselves. Every outcome is written to the Chronicle.
Whom to honor with {icon} {item}? Such largesse is worth +{regard} regard.
Win the favor of your intended, day by day.
Win the favor of {name}, day by day.
You must first bleed in your liege’s wars (service {needed}+, now {current}).
You need at least 200 prestige to rally men to your banner (now {current}).
You renounce {liege} and raise your own banner over your lands. {sovereign} will march to bring you to heel — they can field ~{theirs} against your ~{yours}.
You renounce {liege} and raise your own banner over {province}, seized as your own county. {sovereign} will march to bring you to heel — they can field ~{theirs} against your ~{yours}.
You — held in your own hand
Your liege must at least tolerate you (favor 20+, now {current}).
Your liege’s favor must be 65 or more (now {current}).
Your liege’s favor must be {needed} or more (now {current}).
a step down — folk will mark it
once your story begins, the ☰ menu holds the full start code to share.
she would bring a dowry of {gold} gold
the realms play out on their own
their kin ask a dowry of {gold} gold
they are not yet of age.
they are too close in blood.
they stand far above your station.
you are not yet of age.
your faith permits no more wives.
{gold} gold and {prestige} prestige to plant a settlement on empty land. The new county answers to you — and belongs to no de jure duchy.
{gold} gold and {prestige} prestige — join the gentry.
{realm} · {ruler} · the liege’s favor {favor} · dev {development} · your suit ~{odds}%
{relation} · regard {regard} · your lord’s favor rises with it
{save} · 🧩 another world — its mods are not the ones active now
⚔ At war with {enemy} — victories: {wins}; defeats: {losses} · {status} · battle odds ~{odds}%
⚖ {name} stands above your station — the family will expect great regard and renown before they bless such a match.
⚜ {name} is one county alone — no duke’s title to claim.
🌷 You are courting {name}. Win more of their regard (5+) before proposing — the courtship focus works day by day.
👑 {name}: you hold the majority, {held} — independence would make you its king.
👑 {name}: you hold {held} — {need} and independence make the king.
🕊 A pact of peace holds until {year} AD.
🚩 Your host — {men} at {place}, marching on {goal}. Tap a province on the map to march; tap the host again to halt.
🚩 Your host — {men} at {place}. Tap a province on the map to march; tap the host again to halt.
🛡 They can field ~{theirs} — you can field ~{yours}.
🤝 Betrothed to {name} — the wedding follows once both are of age.
🦅 {name}: you rule {share} — independence would make you its emperor.
🦅 {name}: you rule {share} — {need} and independence make the emperor.
